visual_system.layout_rule: High Contrast, Geometric Structure. Key data points must be highlighted with Neon Cyan accents.

script_reference: Refer to the primary script file for detailed timing and voiceover mapping.

visual_assets_merged.description: Opening Hook - High energy, immediate visual impact. Focus on 'Wisdom meets AI'.
visual_assets_merged.style: Deep Blue background with sharp Neon Cyan geometric lines framing the central text.

visual_assets_merged.description: Data Flow Visualization - Representing the AI process (Experience -> Efficiency).
visual_assets_merged.style: Flowchart/Diagram style. Deep Blue nodes connected by Neon Cyan lines.

visual_assets_merged.description: Conclusion/Call to Action - Emphasizing the result (The AI Advantage).
visual_assets_merged.style: Bold, centered text with a strong Neon Cyan glow effect. Minimalist design.

thumbnail_concept_final.concept: System Architect View (Focus on the structure)
thumbnail_concept_final.color_scheme: Deep Blue dominant with Neon Cyan highlights.
thumbnail_concept_final.key_visual: Abstract representation of a complex system diagram, emphasizing the intersection of deep experience (blue) and cutting-edge AI (cyan). Bold title overlay.
